name: Bank of America Financial Center
description_short: Seattle, WA's Bank of America Financial Center at 4622 25th Ave NE offers convenient in-person banking services to the Green Lake neighborhood.
description_long:
Bank of America Financial Center is located at 4622 25th Ave NE in Seattle, WA, serving the Green Lake neighborhood and surrounding areas. This standalone branch operates during weekday business hours from 9 AM to 4 PM Monday through Friday, with no weekend service. The building is easily accessible for Seattle residents seeking in-person banking solutions.

This Seattle location provides full-service banking including account deposits, withdrawals, account inquiries, and financial consultations. Customers can reach the branch at +1 206-336-0022 to speak with bank representatives about account services, new accounts, loan products, or other financial needs.

If you're a Seattle resident banking with Bank of America, this 25th Ave NE branch offers personal service for banking questions that benefit from face-to-face conversations. Bring a valid photo ID and account information when visiting. The location provides traditional banking service during business hours.
pros: Walk-up ATM available with cardless and contactless payment options
Extended hours: Monday–Friday 9 AM–4 PM, Saturday 9 AM–2 PM
Multilingual ATM support in seven languages including Spanish, Chinese, and Korean
Mobile banking app with mobile check deposit via photo and biometric security (fingerprint/Face ID)
Notary services available at the location
Accepts commercial deposits and non-customer check cashing
Free appointment scheduling with financial specialists for personalized advice
cons: Branch closed Sundays, limiting weekend banking to Saturday mornings only
Full financial advisor services require advance appointment scheduling rather than walk-in availability
ATM hours vary at this location, creating uncertainty for after-hours cardless access
As a large national bank, may have higher fees and less personalized service than credit unions
Limited accessibility information provided regarding ADA compliance or parking facilities
best_for: Philadelphia residents seeking full-service banking with specialist financial planning consultations
Small business owners needing commercial deposit services and business advisory support
Customers preferring multilingual banking support and cardless ATM transactions
Individuals wanting integrated mobile and in-person banking with appointment flexibility
diagnosis: This Bank of America location is best suited for Philadelphia-area customers seeking comprehensive banking services combined with specialist financial guidance, particularly small business owners and individuals planning major financial moves like home purchases or retirement. The primary caveat is that specialized advisory services require advance appointment scheduling, making the location less suitable for customers needing immediate teller assistance with routine transactions.
services: Walk-up ATM with cash withdrawals and deposits
Cardless ATM access via debit card or smartphone digital wallet
Mobile check deposit via smartphone photo
Financial specialist appointments for personal, homeownership, and business planning
Customizable account alerts via mobile app
Biometric security (fingerprint/Face ID) for mobile app access
Multilingual ATM instructions (English, Spanish, Chinese, Korean, French, Russian, Portuguese)
meta_description: Bank of America Financial Center at 4622 25th Ave NE, Seattle, WA. In-person banking, deposits, withdrawals. Open weekdays 9AM-4PM.
